metadata.title: NanoLab | AI, Dev & Digital Strategy Expert — Tunis
metadata.description: NanoLab is a product studio and AI lab based in Tunis. We build applications, strategies and data/AI solutions to turn your ideas into digital success.

hero.description: Product studio + AI lab. We build applications, strategies and data/AI solutions to turn your ideas into digital success.

departments.title: Our 3 Departments
departments.subtitle: An integrated approach to transform your ideas into high-performing digital solutions

items.title: Dev & Tech

items.title: AI & Innovation
items.description: POC, prototypes and AI industrialization to turn your data into a competitive advantage

process.title: Our Process
process.subtitle: A proven methodology to deliver quality projects on time

steps.title: Scoping
steps.description: Defining objectives, project scope and detailed planning with specification validation.

steps.title: Design & Prototype
steps.description: Creating UX/UI mockups, interactive prototyping and user validation before development.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: Development in agile sprints with frequent deliveries and continuous quality testing.

steps.title: Launch + KPI Tracking
steps.description: Production deployment, user training and performance metrics monitoring.
